exploreDashboard.title: Explore
exploreDashboard.description: Dive into the depths of Islamic esoteric science. Browse powerful collections of secrets, proven recipes, and discover the wisdom of the ancients.
exploreDashboard.shareError: Sharing is not supported on this browser.

exploreDashboard.lexiconDesc: Discover the esoteric meaning of Arabic letters (Ilm al-Huruf), sacred numbers and Quranic symbolic elements.
exploreDashboard.quizDesc: Test your knowledge on the science of secrets. From Divine Names to protective Surahs, evaluate your understanding.
exploreDashboard.calendarDesc: Convert Gregorian dates to Hijri dates to identify auspicious lunar days for your spiritual operations.
exploreDashboard.downloadDesc: Access classical treatises in PDF, prayer audios, and blank grids for your wafq.

namesOfAllah.initiationSecret: Initiatory secret: Extracting all these occurrences (Ayat) to recite them together constitutes the "Khatm Al-Akbar" (Great Seal) of this divine Name, releasing the totality of its manifestation energy.

asma.title: Personal Divine Names (Asma)
asma.description: Discover your divine names corresponding to the mystical weight of your name.
asma.subtitle: Deep esoteric analysis of your divine resonance
asma.intro: Enter the Numerical Weight (Abjad) of your full name. This engine will extract the Divine Names whose vibratory value is closest to your essence. Each attribute is detailed according to the science of secrets (Sirr al-Asrar) to define your unique Zikr.
asma.resultsDesc: The first Name displayed is the one that merges most perfectly with your soul imprint. Click on a card to reveal the secrets.
asma.talsamDesc: Vibratory connection formula for the value

questions.q1: Which Surah is often called 'The Heart of the Quran'?
questions.e1: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) said: 'Everything has a heart, and the heart of the Quran is Surah Yasin.'
questions.q2: In the science of letters (Ilm al-Huruf), what is the numerical value of the letter 'Alif' (أ)?
questions.e2: In the Abjad system, Alif is the first letter and has a value of 1.
questions.q3: Which Divine Name is particularly invoked for the opening (Fath) of blocked situations?
questions.e3: Al-Fattah means 'The Opener', 'The Grantor of Success'.
questions.q4: The verse Ayat al-Kursi (The Throne Verse) is found in which Surah?
questions.e4: The Throne Verse is verse 255 of Surah Al-Baqarah.

calendar.title: Hijri Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Gregorian to Hijri Converter
calendar.description: This converter uses the Umm al-Qura Islamic calendar. It allows you to identify auspicious dates (like the middle of the lunar month) for your spiritual practices.

onboarding.s1_desc: Your digital spiritual companion. Explore mystical secrets, track your practices, and elevate your soul.
onboarding.s2_desc: Calculate Abjad values, find planetary hours, and unveil the secrets of letters and numbers.
onboarding.s3_desc: Keep track of your daily Wirds, dreams, and intimate reflections securely.
onboarding.s4_desc: Synchronize with lunar mansions and spiritual calendars for optimal practices.
onboarding.s5_desc: Dive into a deep esoteric lexicon, test your knowledge, and learn from Sufi masters.
onboarding.s6_desc: Connect with other minds seeking light. Share, learn, and grow together.
onboarding.s7_desc: Join us now. The door of secrets is open for those who seek with sincerity.
